subcodes.first_line: Though the winds of sedition in these days of ordeal have extinguished the lamp of the All-Merciful's love in the hearts of men [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: و لو ان روایح الافتتان فی ایام الشداد قد اخمدت سراج حب الرحمن فی صدور الناس
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
